candidate_check.description: The LanMan authentication level must be set to send NTLMv2 response only, and to refuse LM and NTLM.

check_content_excerpt:
If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding:

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\

Value Name: LmCompatibilityLevel

Value Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 5
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Local Policies >> Security Options >> "Network security: LAN Manager authentication level" to "Send NTLMv2 response only. Refuse LM & NTLM".
title: The LanMan authentication level must be set to send NTLMv2 response only, and to refuse LM and NTLM.
